news.t: Weitz Core Plus Bond ETF (WCPB) Reaches $100 Million Milestone in Under Five Months
Weitz Investment Management Launches Two Actively Managed Bond ETFs

overview.description: The Weitz Core Plus Bond ETF (WCPB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund holds a broad portfolio of corporate and government debt securities with an average maturity of below 10 years. The actively managed ETF may invest up to 25% of its assets in high-yield bonds. WCPB was launched on Aug 12, 2025 and is issued by Weitz.

data.title: Weitz Core Plus Bond ETF (WCPB) Reaches $100 Million Milestone in Under Five Months
data.text: OMAHA, Neb.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Weitz Investment Management, Inc. (“Weitz”) today announced that the Weitz Core Plus Bond ETF (WCPB) has surpassed $100 million in assets under management, a notable mile...
